message:
fix(core): resolve 29 lib test compilation errors across 4 files

- ftui_stub.rs: add missing StyleSpec import, fix super::state::View → View
- distributed.rs: RuntimeBuilder::new_current_thread → current_thread + add CompatRuntime import
- metrics.rs: RuntimeBuilder::new_current_thread → current_thread + add CompatRuntime import
- spsc_ring_buffer.rs: runtime_compat::Builder → RuntimeBuilder::current_thread + add CompatRuntime import

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
